arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest make approach for player, Fulham also in picture – PL duo have money to ‘satisfy’ requested fee
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest and Fulham are chasing Juventus’ Douglas Luiz in the winter market. That’s according to Tuttosport, and they cover Nottingham Forest and Fulham desire to try and bring the midfielder back to the Premier League. arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest enquire about loan deal for Douglas Luiz - with the former Aston Villa midfielder also offered to both Manchester clubs and Fulham
arts.sum: SIMON JONES: Luiz, who plays for the same club as his girlfriend, Alisha Lehmann, has played just 13 times for Juventus this season and could already be on his way out of the club.

arts.ttl: Bournemouth recall Daniel Jebbison as Cherries confirm latest major injury blow
arts.sum: Bournemouth recall Daniel Jebbison from his loan spell with Watford after suffering their second major injury blow of the week.

arts.ttl: Watford set to end Jebbison loan early and send him back to Bournemouth
arts.sum: The striker has had a miserable time at Vicarage Road, and his social media posts the Hornets boss described as "a bit of stupidity" haven't helped.

arts.ttl: Fulham contact Kia Joorabchian for signing but Tottenham could ruin their plans
arts.sum: Douglas Luiz has been linked with the likes of Manchester City and Aston Villa in the past few days and it now seems as if Fulham and Tottenham Hotspur are credible candidates to land the Juventus midfielder. arts.ttl: Referee appointed for Watford's FA Cup tie at Fulham
arts.sum: Matt Donohue has been appointed as the referee for Watford's FA Cup third round trip to Fulham tomorrow night.
